description_long: This is a rectangular wooden toolbox with a hinged lid that opens upward, revealing a divided upper compartment with several sections for organizing small items. The upper tray features multiple rectangular and square slots, including a set of parallel grooves likely intended for holding tools or accessories. Below the main compartment, there are two pull-out drawers, each with a metallic knob handle, providing additional storage space. The exterior is finished in a light wood grain, giving it a natural and polished appearance. The interior dividers and drawer interiors appear to be made of a lighter, possibly plastic or painted wood material. The overall design is functional and elegant, suitable for organizing tools or small items in a garage, workshop, or home setting.
description: A wooden toolbox with a hinged lid, divided upper tray, and two pull-out drawers with metallic knobs. The design is clean and organized, featuring multiple compartments for tool storage.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the open lid, divided upper tray, and both drawers partially open with visible metallic knobs.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the wooden exterior and the open lid, with the compartment dividers partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the back and side of the box, with the open lid and the grooved section of the upper tray visible.
description_view_3: Front-right view showing the open lid, divided upper tray, and both drawers open, with a clear view of the compartment layout.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed, round metallic knob handles on each drawer; no visible carrying handle on the main body.
attribute_latch_mechanism: No visible latch or locking mechanism on the lid or drawers.
attribute_compartment_configuration: One upper compartment with multiple fixed dividers, including a grooved section and several rectangular bins; two lower drawers with open interiors, all compartments appear fixed.
